missing_main_functions: Account Login (post-verification) - to ensure verified users can log in successfully
Error Handling & Edge Cases - e.g., network failures, expired tokens, invalid tokens
missing_sub_functions: Password Leading/Trailing Space Handling - explicit test category for BR007 (not trimmed) is missing
Email Prefix Case Sensitivity Handling - no sub-function or category to test case sensitivity of email prefix in password restriction (BR005)
Verification Link Token Validation - testing invalid, tampered, or malformed tokens
Resend Rate Limiting Edge Cases - e.g., multiple rapid requests, concurrent requests
unclear_categories: CAT005 - 'Password Space Restrictions' combines two distinct rules (no consecutive spaces and no trimming of leading/trailing spaces) which should be separate categories for clarity
CAT006 - 'Password Email Prefix Restriction' does not specify whether the check is case-sensitive or case-insensitive, leading to ambiguity
recommendations: Add a main function for 'Account Login' to cover post-verification login scenarios.
Add a main function for 'Error Handling & Edge Cases' to cover system failures, invalid tokens, and expired links.
Split CAT005 into two categories: one for consecutive spaces and one for leading/trailing space preservation.
Add a sub-function for 'Password Leading/Trailing Space Handling' under User Registration.
Add a sub-function for 'Verification Link Token Validation' under Email Verification.
Add a sub-function for 'Resend Rate Limiting Edge Cases' under Email Verification.
Clarify in CAT006 whether email prefix comparison is case-sensitive or case-insensitive.

Consider adding a test category for 'Expired Link Handling' under a new sub-function for 'Verification Link Expiration' (already present as CAT008, but ensure it covers re-registration or alternative flows).
